name: com.caseyfarina.midifighter64
description: MIDI input + LED output bridge for the DJ Tech Tools Midi Fighter 64 and Akai MIDI Mix. Converts raw MIDI events into typed C# events (grid buttons, knobs, faders, toggles), and drives MF64 LEDs via RtMidi. Built on Unity Input System, Minis, and jp.keijiro.rtmidi. Cross-platform (Windows / macOS / Linux).

samples.description: MF64 + MIDI Mix test scene. Includes an 8x8 sphere grid with button-press highlighting, a Play Wave button that drives both on-screen and hardware LEDs, and a raw MIDI event log. Run 'Tools > MidiFighter64 > Create Test Scene' after import to build the scene.
